trends.label: real
trends.title: AI Agent 生态持续扩展
trends.text: 多 agent、工具调用、浏览器操作等方向正在从 demo 走向生产

trends.label: watch
trends.title: AI 视频生成竞赛加速
trends.text: 多家公司发布视频生成模型，质量和速度都在快速提升

trends.label: hype
trends.title: AI 产品同质化严重
trends.text: 大量包装类 AI 产品涌现，核心差异化不足

trends.label: real
trends.title: 多模态成为标配
trends.text: 文本、图像、音频、视频的统一处理能力越来越普遍

trends.label: watch
trends.title: AI 监管政策收紧
trends.text: 全球多地出台 AI 相关法规，合规成本上升

trends.label: hype
trends.title: AI 替代一切的叙事
trends.text: AI 在特定任务上表现优异，但通用替代仍需时间

all_items.title: Locally Confident, Globally Stuck: The Quality-Exploration Dilemma in Diffusion Language Models
all_items.summary: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) theoretically permit token decoding in arbitrary order, a flexibility that could enable richer exploration of reasoning paths than autoregressive (AR) LLMs. In…
all_items.why_it_matters: Locally Confident, Globally… 降低了视觉内容创作门槛，非设计师也能做出专业素材
all_items.content_angle: 拿 Locally Confident, Globally… 生成一组作品截图，发帖「AI 做的图/视频能到什么水平了」

all_items.title: Cog-DRIFT: Exploration on Adaptively Reformulated Instances Enables Learning from Hard Reasoning Problems
all_items.summary: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) has improved the reasoning abilities of LLMs, yet a fundamental limitation remains: models cannot learn from problems that are too difficult to…
all_items.why_it_matters: Cog-DRIFT 降低了定制模型的门槛，小团队也能训练专属 AI
all_items.content_angle: 写 Cog-DRIFT 的微调教程，发帖「手把手教你训练自己的 AI 模型」

all_items.title: ONE-SHOT: Compositional Human-Environment Video Synthesis via Spatial-Decoupled Motion Injection and Hybrid Context Integration
all_items.summary: Recent advances in Video Foundation Models (VFMs) have revolutionized human-centric video synthesis, yet fine-grained and independent editing of subjects and scenes remains a critical challenge.…
all_items.why_it_matters: ONE-SHOT 代表了 AI 研究的最新方向，可能影响未来几个月的产品迭代
all_items.content_angle: 用通俗语言解读 ONE-SHOT，发帖「一句话看懂今天的 AI 论文」

all_items.title: The Geometric Alignment Tax: Tokenization vs. Continuous Geometry in Scientific Foundation Models
all_items.summary: Foundation models for biology and physics optimize predictive accuracy, but their internal representations systematically fail to preserve the continuous geometry of the systems they model. We…
all_items.why_it_matters: The Geometric Alignment Tax 关系到 AI 能不能被安全使用，这是行业的底线问题
all_items.content_angle: 整理 The Geometric Alignment Tax 讨论中的正反观点，发帖「这个争论你站哪边？」

all_items.title: Adam's Law: Textual Frequency Law on Large Language Models
all_items.summary: While textual frequency has been validated as relevant to human cognition in reading speed, its relatedness to Large Language Models (LLMs) is seldom studied. We propose a novel research direction in…
all_items.why_it_matters: Adam's Law 提升了 AI 获取和使用外部知识的能力，准确率更高了
all_items.content_angle: 用 Adam's Law 搭一个简单知识库 demo，发帖「10 分钟搭建 AI 知识助手」

all_items.title: CLEAR: Unlocking Generative Potential for Degraded Image Understanding in Unified Multimodal Models
all_items.summary: Image degradation from blur, noise, compression, and poor illumination severely undermines multimodal understanding in real-world settings. Unified multimodal models that combine understanding and…
all_items.why_it_matters: CLEAR 让 AI 能同时处理文本、图像、语音，应用场景扩大了
